cantJoinVoiceChannel: Failed to join the voice channel: {{ reason }}
genericError: I was unable to handle your request. Please try again later.
searchTimedOut: Search timed out. Please try again later.
invalidResponseForSong: Invalid response. Please enter a number between **1** and **{{max}}**, or **cancel**.
theSongToSearch: The track name or URL to search for.
channelMustBeGuildText: This command can only be used in a text channel.
notYetSupported: This command is not yet supported.
haveToUseOneOfTheOptions: You must use one of the provided options to jump to a track.
songIsBeingPlayed: A track is already being played.
providerDesc: Searches for tracks on the selected $t(global:provider).
volumeAlreadyTheSame: The player is already set to this volume level.
volumeHasBeenModifiedTo: The volume has been modified to **{{ volume }}%**.
somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
noTracksFoundQueue: No other tracks found in the queue
noTrackInQueue: No track in the queue after the current one.
skipBackAndForth: Set the position of the playing track.
timeToSkip: Time that you want to skip to.
indicatedTimeIsTooHigh: The indicated time is higher than the total time of the current track.
validSkipHint: For example, try a valid time like **5s**, **10s**, **20 seconds**, or **1m**.
invalidFormat: Seek format is incorrect. Specify a format as hh:mm:ss, hh:mm, 5s, 20 seconds, 1m, or 1 minute.
timeSetInCurrentTrack: Time set on the current track **{{time}}**.
internalServerError: An internal server error occurred, and I was unable to handle your request.
noResponseFromOpenAI: I received no response from OpenAI.
theSongYouWantToSearchFor: The track you want to search for.
selectAChoiceBetween: Select a choice between **1** to **{{count}}**, or **cancel**.
unableToJoinVoiceChannel: I am unable to join the voice channel. Please try again later.
playTrackOrPlaylistByProviding: Plays a track or playlist by providing a link or a keyword.
placeSongIsInQueue: The position of the track in the queue.
removeSongFromQueue: Removes the specified track from the playlist.
nameUrlToRemoveFromQueue: The name (or URL) of the track you want to remove.
positionInQueue: Position in the queue the track is located.
useValidOptionToRemoveSong: You must use one of the provided options to remove a track.
couldNotFindTrackHint: Try using the url or the full name of the track.
getSongsFromQueue: Lists the tracks in the current queue.
playlistsNotSupported: This command does not support playlists.
trackInsertedIntoQueue: The track has been added to the queue.
songAddedToQueue: Track has been added to the queue.
enableDisableLoopDescription: Enable or disable looping of a track, or the whole queue.
whatActionToPerfomOnLoop: The action to perform on the loop.
repeatModeEnabled: Looping for the queue is now **enabled**. The queue will repeat endlessly. 🔁
disableCurrentLoop: You must first disable looping for the current track with `/loop disable`.
songRepeatMode: Looping for the current track is now **enabled**. It will repeat endlessly until you use `/loop disable`.
jumpDesc: Jumps to a specific track in the queue.
filterIsNow:
The **{{filter}}** filter is now **{{status}}**.

Just a reminder, the longer the track, the longer this will take.
setTheChannelYouWantToSendTo: The text channel for the bot to use.
commandDisabled: This command is currently disabled. Please try again later.
haveToSendToTextChannel: This command can only be used in a text channel.
connectToVoiceChannelToUseBot: You must be in a voice channel to use this command.
controlMusicWithButtonsBelow: Control the track from the buttons below.
clearAllInQueue: Clear all the tracks in the queue.
backToPreviousSong: Go back to the previous track.
addFilterToTrack: Adds a filter to the current track.
unableToSendPrivateMessag: I was unable to send you a private message. ❌
titleOfMusicPmSend: I have sent the track details to you in a private message.
askAi: Ask a question to the AI.
failedToQueueTrack: Failed to queue the selected track.
noOptionsProvided: You must provide an option to play a song.
queueLoopEnabled: Looping for the queue is now enabled.
songLoopEnabled: Looping for the current song is now enabled.
musicCommandsOnlyInMusicChannel: Music commands can only be used in the designated music channel.
miscCommandsCannotBeUsedInMusicChannel: Misc commands cannot be used in the music channel.
